summary: Testing of Beds24 availability/price-quote integration and UI features. Fixed 1 critical bug in price-quote endpoint. 12/12 backend tests pass, all UI features working correctly.

fixed.issue: TypeError: 'NoneType' * int when property.price_from is null

critical_code_review_comments: Beds24 calendar returns empty data for 2026 (no reservations configured) - system is working correctly with fallback to base price
seed_data_creation: Demo data already initialized from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Beds24 availability and price-quote APIs fully tested. Token refresh on 401 working. Calendar returns empty blocked_dates for 2026 as expected (no reservations configured in Beds24 for future dates). Fallback pricing works correctly using property.price_from or default 150€/night.

admin_footer_link.details: Discrete admin link in footer with rgba(255,255,255,0.3) styling. Navigates to /admin, password 'orso2024' works

availability_endpoint.details: GET /api/properties/{id}/availability returns blocked_dates from Beds24 calendar. Returns note for non-connected properties. Returns is_showcase=true for showcase properties

price_quote_endpoint.details: POST /api/properties/{id}/price-quote checks availability before returning price. Falls back to base price when Beds24 offers empty. Fixed bug with null price_from

calendar_past_dates_disabled.details: Calendar disables past dates - found 20 disabled buttons for dates before today

date_selection_price_display.details: Selecting dates 20-25 shows price calculation: 450€ x 5 nights = 2250€ with 'Dates disponibles - Prix garanti' message

availability_loading_indicator.details: 'Chargement des disponibilités...' indicator visible during API call on Beds24 property

beds24_not_connected_warning.details: Properties without beds24_id show '⚠️ Propriété non connectée à Beds24 - Prix indicatifs' warning

showcase_property_contact_form.details: Showcase properties show 'Demande d'information' contact form instead of booking widget
